name: DrawingEnumeratorBase
summary: The DrawingEnumeratorBase class is a base class for DrawingObjectEnumerator and DrawingEnumerator.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Allows the usage of the foreach statement with DrawingObjectEnumerator.

methods.name: GetSize
methods.summary: Returns the total amout of items.

methods.name: MoveNext
methods.summary: Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

properties.name: AutoFetch
properties.summary: Indicates that the objects are fetched from the drawing when the enumerator is created. Object information is therefore not anymore fetched when 'Current' item is asked from the enumerator. Property value is used for all enumerators in application
